introSection: Beyond the Cloud is a steel launched roller coaster at Suzhou Amusement Land Forest World in Huqiu, Suzhou, Jiangsu, China.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Beyond the Cloud is a steel launched roller coaster at Suzhou Amusement Land Forest World in Huqiu, Suzhou, Jiangsu, China.



2 trains with 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.
